name: Photo Gallery Added to Homepage
prompt: Add a photo gallery to my homepage to show off our recent work. Use placeholder images for now.

checks.judge: A gallery or image grid section appears on the homepage displaying placeholder images labeled as recent work or similar

dry_run.text: I've added a photo gallery section to your homepage with placeholder images for your recent work.

edits.content/pages/index.mdx:
---
title: Home
description: Welcome to our site
---

<Hero
  heading="Welcome to Our Business"
  subheading="Quality products and services for everyone"
  actions={[{ label: "Contact Us", href: "/contact", variant: "primary" }]}
/>
<Gallery
  heading="Recent Work"
  subheading="A look at some of our latest projects"
  columns={3}
  images={[
    { src: "/images/placeholder-1.jpg", alt: "Project 1" },
    { src: "/images/placeholder-2.jpg", alt: "Project 2" },
    { src: "/images/placeholder-3.jpg", alt: "Project 3" }
  ]}
/>
